_doc: State file written by the Fireflies → PPL Dash auto-ingest scheduled task. Tracks which transcripts have been processed so re-runs are idempotent. Do not edit by hand unless you know what you're doing.
lastRunMessage: Merged the previously-split GL6 + GL6 continued into a single Lesson 6 entry. The two Fireflies transcripts (01KRFAB18R5HQ57M1SNB39Y5QW airworthiness 2h 10m + 01KRFHTP5EXPETC68P2469DECC airspace 15m) are now represented as one lesson with duration 2.42 hrs and a unified sparknotes chapter (22 flashcards) + single quiz (22 questions). Added a one-shot migration in runAutoIngestedLessons() that removes the old GL6/GL6B fireflies_id entries from state.ground and clears 'GL6'/'GL6B' from ppl_seeded_lessons (guarded by migration marker 'GL6_MERGE_2026_05_13') so existing users get a clean re-seed on next load. Both fireflies_ids remain in ingestedFirefliesIds so future nightly syncs skip them correctly. SW cache bumped v20 → v21. JS validated with node --check (clean).
